author: opus

trio.ponytail: smallest-diff recommendation per issue (reuse existing enum/RLS/components)
trio.context7: not required this run (no third-party library API surface)

issues.title: Public guide profile centering
issues.root_cause: wrapper items-start/text-left governs all children; center avatar+badge+region per-element

issues.title: Suspended user restrictions incomplete
issues.root_cause: core enforcement already shipped in DB post-report (assert_active_account + RLS on 5 RPCs/3 tables); remaining = untouched write policies + no app UX + prod-application unverified
issues.live_note: example request URL now 404s; cannot reproduce live, code/RLS audit stands

issues.title: Joined open group request detail lacks excursion details
issues.root_cause: no 'member' viewer role; joined traveler -> PublicDetailBranch which never renders viewModel.notes (full) or viewModel.themes

issues.title: Open group request forum-style shared discussion
issues.root_cause: request-subject thread already scaffolded in schema (enum+table+RLS fn) but unused by app; can_access_request_thread excludes joined members; no UI; no request-thread write path

issues.title: Admin Listings purpose unclear
issues.root_cause: listings page is a pending_review moderation queue, near-duplicate of moderation page's Объявления tab

issues.title: Admin Bookings incomplete status coverage
issues.root_cause: bookings filter already shows all statuses; pre-booking lifecycle lives in traveler_requests/guide_offers, never enters bookings table

issues.title: Duplicate guide listing buttons
issues.root_cause: header 'Создать экскурсию' (always-visible, blue) and empty-state 'Добавить экскурсию' (outline) both call openCreateSheet; removing wrong one leaves populated state without add button

issues.title: Guide listing save button hidden below viewport
issues.root_cause: SheetContent is flex-col h-full but body div is not a scroll region; footer overflows off-screen

issues.title: Admin Moderation purpose unclear
issues.root_cause: moderation page overlaps listings (same pending_review dataset); unique content is review-replies queue

blocking.B-1: Issue 42 forum model: E1 single shared request thread (recommended) vs E2 mirror private per-guide offer-QA to members
blocking.B-2: Issues 43/47: F1 merge into one Moderation center (recommended) vs F2 rename Listings + split
blocking.B-3: Issue 44: G1 separate pipeline tab (recommended) vs G2 unified funnel view; confirm target statuses
blocking.B-4: Issue 41: anonymous visitors see full description+interests or members-only (recommend members-only, keep anon teaser)

non_blocking_defaults.D-1: Issue 45 surviving button = 'Добавить экскурсию', blue, header, always visible
non_blocking_defaults.D-2: Issue 33 stats row centers with identity cluster
non_blocking_defaults.D-3: Issue 35 proxy blocks suspended on mutation/dashboard routes with logout+support allowlist (not full lockout)

key_landmines: prod-migration-drift: verify shipped enforce_active_account migrations applied on VPS before 35 done; never db push on prod
42 RLS over-grant: can_access_request_thread already grants request_views viewer-guides; confirm audience before wiring writes
do not reuse send_qa_message for 42 (offer-only, 8-msg cap)
AP-014 client/server import boundary if splitting thread constants
most QA (33/35/41-47 auth pages) needs seeded admin/guide/traveler/suspended sessions; green build != done
